values.description: Capture WAF Block events and send notification
values.event_pattern: {"detail":{"eventName":["UpdateWebACL","DeleteWebACL"]},"detail-type":["WAF Configuration Change","AWS API Call via CloudTrail"],"source":["aws.wafv2"]}
values.name: waf-block-detection
